no_changes_rationale:
The proposed-policy delta matrix implementation is already complete in the repository.

Commit ae15693 (build(ui): finalize proposed policy matrix deltas [axon-ff92fed7]) landed all
required changes. The implementation covers every acceptance criterion:

1. policy-authoring.spec.ts test "surfaces active-vs-proposed deltas across
   read|create|update|patch|delete fixture rows" (line 303–409) verifies:
   - allow/deny/needs_approval decision changes (data-decision-changed)
   - redacted field deltas (data-redacted-changed)
   - denied field deltas (data-denied-changed)
   - policy_filter_unindexed diagnostic regression (data-diagnostic-changed,
     policy-impact-matrix-diagnostic-proposed showing 'policy_filter_unindexed')
   - all 5 operations × 2 entities × 3 subjects

2. Unchanged cells render the policy-impact-matrix-cell-unchanged span with text
   "unchanged" and no policy-impact-matrix-cell-proposed child (line 379–384).

3. Transaction delta unavailable affordance: policy-impact-matrix-cell-transaction-unavailable
   rendered whenever a proposed draft is present, linking to /ui/beads/axon-84038791
   (lines 1147–1155 and 1315–1323 of +page.svelte).

4. ui/src/lib/policy-impact-delta.ts CellDelta type and computeCellDelta function cover
   all delta dimensions; 14 unit tests in policy-impact-delta.test.ts, all passing.

5. TypeScript type check: 0 errors across 361 files (bun run typecheck).

No code changes are needed. The bead should be closed.

verification_command: grep -rq 'policy-impact-matrix-cell-delta' ui/src/ && grep -rq 'surfaces active-vs-proposed deltas' ui/tests/e2e/policy-authoring.spec.ts && (cd ui && bun test src/lib/policy-impact-delta.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -q '0 fail')
